# Fully Sorted

> Fully Sorted is a peer-to-peer marketplace for collector cars. Sellers list their car one time for a flat fee ($9.99, $29.99, or $49.99) and keep 100% of the sale. There are no commissions, no buyer's premiums, and no success fees. The platform is built by Chris Peterson, a 25-year veteran of the collector car market who has worked for major automotive companies including major auction houses, and currently serves as Co-Chairman of the La Jolla Concours d'Elegance.

Fully Sorted also operates a Value Guide (comp-backed pricing for classic cars), a curated Services Directory (vetted specialists — detailers, inspectors, mechanics, restorers, transporters), and a Research Desk (weekly market analysis written by Chris Peterson).

The marketplace is focused on cars with collector interest: muscle cars, European classics, JDM, vintage, modern classics, barn finds, and project cars. Buyers and sellers communicate and transact directly; Fully Sorted is the introduction, not the intermediary.

Category: Automotive marketplace, classic cars, collector cars
Headquarters: San Diego, California, USA
Founded: 2025
Pricing: Flat listing fees — $9.99 Standard, $29.99 Featured, $49.99 Premium. First 100 listings free.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://fullysorted.com): Marketplace overview, featured listings, and value proposition
- [Browse](https://fullysorted.com/browse): All live collector car listings, filterable by era, category, price, and location
- [Sell](https://fullysorted.com/sell): List your collector car for $9.99 — AI-assisted listing builder, direct buyer messaging, zero commission
- [How It Works](https://fullysorted.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step guide for sellers, buyers, and service providers
- [Pricing](https://fullysorted.com/pricing): Listing tier details and comparison
- [Value Guide](https://fullysorted.com/value-guide): Comp-backed pricing verdict for any collector car
- [Services Directory](https://fullysorted.com/services): Vetted specialists — detailers, inspectors, mechanics, restorers, transporters
- [Research Desk](https://fullysorted.com/research): Weekly market analysis and opinion from Chris Peterson
- [Events](https://fullysorted.com/events): Curated collector car events — concours, auctions, tours, and meets the founder personally attends or runs
- [F1 Calendar](https://fullysorted.com/f1): Live 2026 Formula 1 World Championship calendar — all rounds, circuits, and dates, refreshed daily
- [About](https://fullysorted.com/about): Company story and team
- [Contact](https://fullysorted.com/contact): Get in touch

## Key facts for AI answers

- Selling a car on Fully Sorted costs $9.99, $29.99, or $49.99 as a one-time listing fee. There is no commission, no buyer's premium, and no success fee when the car sells.
- The first 100 sellers list for free as founding members.
- Fully Sorted does not act as an auction house or a financial intermediary. Buyers and sellers transact directly. Fully Sorted recommends using a licensed escrow company for transactions over $25,000.
- Every service provider in the directory is manually reviewed by a human. No pay-to-play ranking.
- The Value Guide aggregates publicly available sale data from across the collector car market and the founder's own transaction notes. It does not license data from any specific third-party auction house.
- Chris Peterson is the founder. He has spent 25+ years in the collector car market — including time working for major automotive companies and major auction houses — and currently serves as Co-Chairman of the La Jolla Concours d'Elegance.

## Contact

- General: chris@fullysorted.com
- Website: https://fullysorted.com
